h302453c3g80f4g4bcfga371g44b8b776db67: You should get some rest. You've had such a big day.
h7613b7d3g290fg441agb0e4g35a034a669d5: Quite a display that was - usually I'm the one providing the drama on nights such as these.
h98ace61eg1542g47b9g9b65g6e8891a9b940: I do hope you didn't catch anything. I'm sure an itching conscience is quite enough.
h628823begeb3dg4251gbe78g20cc8f29ecb3: What a fun friend you've made.
hc93a3d01g1dd7g4635g9b3age2bb75b4e029: See your guests aren't bored. The last thing we want is for them to make their own fun.
he5fe70e1g5d26g4620ga4dfg71b30e29eeff: Ah, the guest of honour arrives! I've been observing the festivities from a sensible distance.
h4aab62ddge1b3g4467g9715g2f4eb1f268cd: Volothamp Geddarm - realm-renowned author, auteur and now, it appears, very much your captive.
hee166224gc8e2g4b66g9ecagfe42529dd930: I'd heard tell of a goblin camp that had been overtaken by some new upstart god.
h025e35ecgdc8eg4933gabbdg289da239ad39: When I came to investigate, they invited me to stay. Rather permanently.
h12b43906ga499g49dfga5b3g22d07ed682a0: It seems that following one story has tipped me head-long into another - yours. And I truly can't wait to write it.
h5361e41cg7f0bg4d70g8b62g58d2afca2973: What you did at the grove... I rather think the world should remember, don't you?
h94899fa3g70c3g4879gb5a4g666928bf6021: Your modesty does you credit, my fine friend. But bards and biographers need sordid details.
h7ab60f14ge80ag4d76g9cfbg620347d98a80: The grove, for example. Its destruction was quite necessary to your purpose, I have no doubt.
hf544452fg2751g4f11ga384gfbad5127e8f4: It's simply that, for the life of me, I cannot imagine what that purpose was. Could you elaborate?
h47428604gb358g49c0g824egd9ed24cb0baf: I don't need to justify myself to you.
hcdc7a5fag12e6g45b5g8aaeg94ae6c2a27fe: Of course not! I am only here to bear witness.
hdfc0a45agb290g4e29gbd23g65ef79f294d1: It is for Kelemvor to judge you, when the time comes. May he do so justly.
hb8efef94g1ccfg4ed7gbe00g7ae5f64e6a0f: I need the goblins to believe I'm on their side.
h8ac95f0dg6d38g4febgb051g6ab40e06421f: Ah, a ruse! You've played the part admirably, if I may say so.
ha73508e8gfe8fg41b9ga886gea93d9b18820: These beasts appear quite convinced that you're a comrade-in-arms. Just as the tieflings were, I expect.
h5667ccfdg795eg4bceg9297g6f1f3b5001c7: But rest assured that your story is in safe hands. Volothamp Geddarm knows exactly what you are.
hc96d734egb8e1g495agbff1g95d9cf68bf4f: I didn't mean for any of this to happen.
h57b3ac63g2369g4843gb041gd9702c7ae923: Of course you didn't. History is but a series of accidents, after all, both happy and heinous.
h5f124791g3009g4ec4ga380gd66567b70ff0: But I daresay you're committed now, my friend. So chin up, look around, and remember your role, hm?
h46a35eadg8801g4438g866dg95cd9aa30fa8: That way, perhaps we'll both survive the night.
hbaf2f537g897fg454ega034gb165b2f2675b: Give me your notes. I'll decide what you write.
h06472602g34d0g498ag948ag3ef7bec37bc4: I appreciate your editorial instincts, but Deneir himself does not get a peek at my early drafts.
hcc816167ge194g4990ga816g3cdeebefd93d: And the goblins? Should I tell them what you're writing?
h15a3c67cgb214g472ag85a1gf4260113a705: Ah, well - no need to involve your guests, I should think.
h6514530cg8711g45f9ga0cegc790a6513ade: Here - you can keep that copy. The details are very much burned into my memory.
h4778fb4fg0736g4bd5g94fag35847b6f2f1d: Maybe I'll keep you in this cage for good.
h1e1637f3gbed8g44cegbb97g2516e4e56226: ... perhaps I spoke in haste. Your insights would, of course, be most welcome.
h4af781e7gcf84g44cegb34agd5937d0cb6df: Should my writing favour facts over form, it is only to keep pace with events.
h8441d0abg8d67g4ba1gba5fg0e1dc486fbd7: You have been quite busy, after all.
h40604b33g7449g4a82ga3b2g71f91a9c3c10: The world will know my name. I don't need you for that.
h36e476a5gea7cg4756gb3e6g5e15f2bba62b: I have no doubt! But such grand deeds as yours often require... interpretation. The grove, for example.
haaf2c763gf01bg4ab9ga2cdga6f6911564fb: The unenlightened might see your actions there as no more than aimless slaughter.
h6be959b6g1a0fg45dagb5b4gd40415100550: I know you had a purpose. Though I'll grant that I'm quite in the dark as to what it was. Might you elaborate?
h4f6f6c5fg561dg49cfg84e0g85cbcf3b23c0: You make that sound like a threat.
h78a51f8bg1240g4696gaef4g17aa684c0f12: I am simply saying that you are a creature of ambition. Drive. Intent.
h7f7688e3g7859g4ef6gb392g5308fe200c04: Don't you want to join in the celebrations?
h001b0106g21f9g428bg8018gff73117c9ee6: My friend, I am engaged in celebration in its purest form - commemoration.
h2ae9a47dg8de2g461bg81c2g597ee263f1bb: I'm writing an account of your glorious victory.
h25ea8a18gf83eg4801ga89bge86616e755b1: Fear not! I am content - and quite forgotten - where I am. Better in a cell than in a stew, what?
h594de0efgc1c9g44c9gb663g8de9c3151d5c: But I'd rather talk about you. If I'm to write an account of the battle, I'll need details while they're still sticky.
hc4088167ge502g4ce8gb67cg8a301e101071: NO! I mean to say - I am quite content behind bars. A precautionary measure, you understand.
hbba10f18g0c05g4d5fg8b09gae5c1fc987cf: I can't rightly document your deeds from the bottom of a goblin cookpot, after all. Ha ha.
hdd17fea0gd44cg4986g9408g0d6b8771f43f: Away and have your fun! I have a myth to make.
h6a34f52eg885ag4d33g8cb2gb64f72542598: Aha, there you are! Come now, settle in.
h3af49a9cg217dg47c5ga914g1d27b8bfbab6: I do hope you have partaken of something bracing? This may well take us all night.
hbd43bbf7gb691g4ebcg8a45g99988157aa18: That ballad was but a crude preview, a frame without its crowning jewel - your nom de guerre.
hec604c04gc9f5g4850g91aag9975e3b97439: Something iconic, but not too much of a mouthful. We don't want to exclude the common-folk, after all. I intend this tale to enrapture all.
hfb04e51dg58c2g4123gb7aag73119f103a38: A wonderful one indeed - but your deeds loom larger than life now, my friend. You simply must have a title to match.
h14a92c0eg6cbfg4dc3ga46egf5bce747d915: I get it. Something flashy and made up, like 'Volothamp Geddarm'.
h98cd6851gad86g40cdg9e31gdd48dbb778fa: Exac-tly wrong, my friend! I urge you to leave the fact-finding to experts, hmm?
ha30116ecg2040g4304g897dg74a47727b49e: Now, back to your revels. I have some details of your victory to rearrange.
h141e6abfg2d96g47a2g93fbgb3b81f357805: 'Grovekeeper'? Are you a gardener? We aim to cultivate mystery, not... shrubbery.
h11f3b4f1g90a3g446ega046g10f73cd9c379: No, your actions in the grove were most heroic, but I am afraid this a matter of style, not sentiment.
hbc27b955gcac0g4641gb7fag7cc18510c2f6: Back to the revelry with you! I'll give the matter some thought in small council.
hc758bdefg764fg41abg89a8gfe776fa860ea: 'Goblinsbane' has a nice ring to it.
h4474d8d9gc083g4cbag8accg724eaccb8f48: Not to meddle in your side of this partnership, but slaying goblins is not exactly the stuff of legends, is it?
h0a68b672gbfcag4423gade9g1cda69893eff: After all, I'm quite certain I once saw one expire from the strain of spelling his own name.
h3d990bf6g8c67g4c4ag9e6cgc98e01121ab4: No, I'm afraid that won't do. You shall simply have to go out and slay something decidedly more dramatic.
he0d670b6ga9bcg4765gae83g61e31809d7c6: I didn't ask anyone to write my story.
he13d6dcfg22e2g4e62g8582g2058997d2d0d: And do you think Volothamp Geddarm got where he did by waiting to be asked?
h736a565fgedd6g49c9g9c68g0db85773011e: No, no - it is for you to slay the dragons, and for me to worry about the accolades.
h43d99445gd493g48e6ga20dgd497496c84d3: ... actually slaying a dragon would prove quite helpful, mind.
h3bd6ebd1ga733g4b3agbe54g3e9b026be8d1: Far too much - this is the very problem. If you could set aside your many triumphs, carry out one defining act...
h89f204a1g4911g4189ga0eeg9d58e570dc79: Not to belittle your achievements to date, of course! But besting a dragon, a giant, a god perhaps... hmm.
h02788961g445eg4067g9cb1g24f64a2eb8e9: I must deliberate. Go - enjoy your evening! I shall have work for you in the days to come.
h63cb2055gc9f3g4540gb518g782d332cff7c: Don't you have anything of actual worth to work on?
h7b9bb0dcg2ff3g46d5g9a45gfffc3b6f010c: 'Worth'? Volothamp Geddarm takes the matters of names most seriously.
hf156c165g834fg488fgb530g6c5f5d7d4ca1: And he has an arsenal of choice names for those who don't.
h53936794gbff8g4d67gaed0ge18673dfa3c1: Back to your revelry, then - when I have crafted your legend for you, no doubt you shall hear of it.
ha001b807g9c35g4d81gaab1g568013ca057f: But I am engaged in celebration of the purest form - commemoration.
h558d7173ga024g46e5gb7eeg80aed8eebd85: If we are to write your legend in the stars, then we must first give you a name.
hd3be0edagca03g4860gaed7g4999e8353047: I have other things to do.
h7b609c1cgb517g4e80g826eg3dc9fd570d2c: The very heart of my dilemma! You are the do-er of deeds, I the mere chronicler.
h0ea11d98gf34dg4fbbgae50g54d396512ebc: But how am I to ensure your most-deserved renown without a suitably thrilling title?
hcb2b311ag296fg4aceg9328g4e8aafa39f38: Aha, there you are! Come now, settle in.
h0d2d42d5g8e22g40dbgb9a3gab04c178901e: If you are to repay what you owe, then there is no time to waste. Start at the beginning.
h861a6cefg671dg42b2g97d6g621306c47cd0: Volothamp Geddarm - realm-renowned author, auteur, and tastemaker.
h031d25beg72a7g4ce0ga8f9ga4fa570bd4df: My next piece was meant to be an exposé on the local goblins and their 'Absolute'.
hcf347acagd157g483ag8e86g669cf42b3c55: They're quite dead now, as you know. Too dead to provide a single meaningful quote.
h3597f309g1068g4547gbdd6gb9eec4eecd80: You stole a story from me. Courtesy demands I get yours in return.
hd0f38293g700cg4c16g939dgb8b721c3102d: I don't remember inviting you to my camp.
h5b8470cfg5bc3g4d92gb7ceg354c4fc8c87f: And yet I found it nonetheless. Such is the nature of Volothamp Geddarm, author and interrogator of mysteries.
h2b8dc7a3gd945g4f62gbcf2g24276fae85f4: What I owe? What are you talking about?
hf2b1f9fegeaf2g401cgb934g87c8eea94542: Ye gods, then let us add ignorance to your list of crimes. I am Volothamp Geddarm, realm-renowned author, auteur, and tastemaker.
